def negative_python_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_error_message_formatted_on_success_path():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_error_message_formatted_on_success_path"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag expensive error messages built before checking whether an error exists."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
